reviews.comment:
Me "regalaron" por $5000 la pelota del mundial pinchada y deforme. Nadie se hace cargo. No ellos, ni YPF, ni serviclub (garantía de DOS días dicen que tiene la pelota). Impresentables. Nunca más ni ACA ni ypf

(Translated by Google)
They "gave" me a punctured and deformed World Cup ball for $5,000. No one is taking responsibility. Not them, not YPF, nor Serviclub (they say the ball has a two-day warranty). Disgraceful. Never again, neither ACA nor YPF.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdnVPNkFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Soy socio del ACÁ desde 1978 y es un Excelente lugar, yo cada vez que viajo, paro para estirar las piernas y además tomar unos mates a la sombra de los árboles que tienen. O comer y beber bebidas frías. Tienen descuentos para todos los socios, tanto para los combustibles y para consumo interno presentado el Carné de Socio. Baños impecable y atención de 10. Recomiendo al 100 por ciento.  👍👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

(Translated by Google)
I've been a member of ACÁ since 1978, and it's an excellent place. Every time I travel, I stop to stretch my legs and enjoy some mate in the shade of the trees. Or eat and drink cold beverages. They offer discounts for all members, both on fuel and for domestic consumption upon presentation of a Membership Card. The bathrooms are spotless, and the service is top-notch. I recommend it 100%. 👍👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtN29XZF9BRRAB
